M2005_MDCTN_INTRVTN M2005 Medication Intervention This field indicates if there were any clinically significant medication issues since the previous OASIS assessment, was a physician or physician-designee contacted within one calendar day of the assessment to resolve clinically significant medication issues. 0 = No
1 = Yes
9 = NA - There were no potential clinically significant medication issues identified since SOC/ROC or patient is not taking any medications CHAR 1 x x
